description: Replacement for native `<select>` HTML element. Forces selection from the dropdown list without type-ahead.

props.chips: Changes display of selections to chips.
props.closableChips: Enables the [closable](/api/v-chip/#props-closable) prop on all [v-chip](/components/chips/) components.
props.hideSelected: Do not display in the select menu items that are already selected.
props.items: Can be an array of objects or strings. By default objects should have **title** and **value** properties, and can optionally have a **props** property containing any [VListItem props](/api/v-list-item/#props). Keys to use for these can be changed with the **item-title**, **item-value**, and **item-props** props.
props.itemValue: Set property of **items**'s value - **must be primitive**. Dot notation is supported. **Note:** This is currently not supported with `v-combobox` [GitHub Issue](https://github.com/vuetifyjs/vuetify/issues/5479).
props.minWidth: Sets the minimum width of the select's `v-menu` content.
props.multiple: Changes select to multiple. Accepts array for value.
props.openOnClear: When using the **clearable** prop, once cleared, the select menu will either open or stay open, depending on the current state.

slots.item: Define a custom item appearance. The root element of this slot must be a **v-list-item** with `v-bind="props"` applied. `props` includes everything required for the default select list behaviour - including title, value, click handlers, virtual scrolling, and anything else that has been added with [`item-props`](api/v-select/#props-item-props).
